error TS-1: Pre-emit (0) and post-emit (8) diagnostic counts do not match! This can indicate that a semantic _error_ was added by the emit resolver - such an error may not be reflected on the command line or in the editor, but may be captured in a baseline here!

                [e: string]: any;
